R0235.title: Chargeback and Refund Abuse
R0235.definition: Users or organized groups obtain improper refunds through chargebacks, empty-package claims, or fabricated after-sales evidence.
R0235.description: Users or organized groups obtain improper refunds through chargebacks, empty-package claims, or fabricated after-sales evidence.
R0235.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
